## What changed

Describe the user or developer problem and the smallest complete solution.

## How it was verified

List the exact focused tests and proof layers you ran. Keep local, Docker, provider, hosted, and
production evidence separate.

## Checklist

- [ ] I added or updated focused tests.
- [ ] `make check` passes.
- [ ] Container checks pass if packaging or topology changed.
- [ ] No credential, private source, local path, or unsanitized log is included.
- [ ] Repository isolation, input limits, and citation metadata are preserved.
- [ ] API, client, and interface behavior are synchronized.
- [ ] Public and extension documentation is updated.
- [ ] Any reindex, migration, or compatibility impact is called out.
